title: Tcat's Paintball (tpb)
body:
I have a few updates planned out, and if this gets enough positive feed back, I will implement them.

Note! This is still very new, if you have any issues, please report them on the issues page, and I will try to help.

Other Note! This is not ready for survival, it requires an admin to run.

When this project hit 100 downloads, I will start working on the next update! It will have more Paintball guns to choose from, and maybe even some skins!


Features:    
- Paintball Gun, gotten with /function paintball:give  
- Config Screen, opened with /function paintball:config  
- Auto Score Keeping, start a game with /function paintball:start_game, and paintball:end_game  
- 7 Teams with Colors, Magenta, Blue, Yellow, Red, Cyan, Green, effects gun impact particle colors  
- Auto Timed Games, while on 1.20.2  
- /trigger join_team, to join a team, dissabled after a game is started  
- Autopearl Stasis Chamber, formed by dropping eye of ender on glass, drop on an ender pearl to   
- charge, or even hopper in, then power with redstone to active   
        
Setup: First run /paintball:load then run /paintball:config to change configs  


Recommended Maps:  
- Dronko's 2-5 players map (https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/paint-ball-map-2-to-5-players/)
